summary: Identified and fixed the 'chat not found' error in bot API by adding fallback mechanism. When bot cannot send messages to a group (due to not being added or lacking permissions), the system now falls back to userbot messaging. Added group status checking in admin panel to show whether bot is properly configured in the order group. Enhanced error handling for both main order group and additional order groups with proper fallback to userbot when bot API fails.
current_status: System now has robust error handling with bot API as primary method and userbot as fallback. Admin panel shows bot status in groups. The order sending system is resilient and will work even if bot is not properly configured in all groups, ensuring no orders are lost due to configuration issues.
